completion_rule: all type=1 original research anchors must connect through type>=1 hexes using exact direct TC4 component links
knowledge_rule: completion only accepts links where the player knows both linked aspects
placement_rule: placing consumes one aspect pool point after a successful empty active hex placement
refund_rule: clearing a player placed type=2 hex refunds one aspect pool point
cleanup_rule: when solved, disconnected non-anchor placed hexes are pruned like TC4 removes non-remains
conversion_rule: solved note right-click converts to completed original research if original prerequisites still pass
